title: carex pumila
intro: Carex pumila, also known as dwarf sedge, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. The medicinal properties of Carex pumila include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory problems, and even reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Carex pumila typically involve making teas or infusions from its roots or leaves, and it can also be used in tinctures or salves to harness its medicinal properties.
